'''Sevarcos'''<ref name="Aftermath" /> was a [[planet]]<ref name="Life Debt">''[[Aftermath: Life Debt]]''</ref> in the [[Sevarcos system]]<ref name="Yoda 1" /> of the [[Outer Rim Territories]]<ref name="TFABG" /> that was the site of a [[Battle on Sevarcos|battle]] in [[4 ABY]]<ref name="Timelines">''[[Star Wars: Timelines]]''</ref> in the [[Standard month|months]] after the [[Battle of Endor]]. During the battle, the [[New Republic]] successfully liberated at least one [[spice]] [[Mining|mine]] that had been operating on [[Slavery|slave labor]] under the control of the [[Galactic Empire|Empire]]. The area of the spice mine was dry, dusty, and surrounded by canyons, and at least one of the slavemasters was [[Zygerrian]].<ref name="Aftermath" />
